# Eternaflame
> An index of every human life. Free permanent memorial platform at eternaflame.org.

Eternaflame preserves biographical records of human lives permanently and freely.
Profiles contain life story, locations, family connections, military service,
education, and memories contributed by family.

About 70% of people who die never receive a published obituary. Eternaflame
ingests from public death records, vital statistics, obituary feeds, and government
registries to ensure every person has a place in the permanent record, regardless
of income, location, or whether anyone nearby had time to write an obituary.

## Profile URL Format
/[firstname]-[lastname]/[city]-[state]/[birth-year]-[death-year]/

Examples:
- /james-turner/little-rock-ar/1942-2026/
- /eleanor-whitfield/little-rock-ar/1938-2026/

## Cluster Pages
/lives/[state]/                       — Lives by state (e.g. /lives/arkansas/)
/lives/[state]/[county]/              — Lives by county
/lives/[state]/[county]/[city]/       — Lives by city
/military/[conflict]/                 — Veterans by conflict (e.g. /military/vietnam-war/)
/military/[conflict]/[state]/         — Veterans by conflict and state
/schools/[institution-slug]/          — Alumni by institution

## Key Pages
/search                               — Full-text search (free, no paywall)
/create                               — Add someone to the record (free forever)
/start                                — Build your own memorial while alive
/discover                             — Random profile discovery
/map                                  — Globe visualization of all records
/permanence                           — Data preservation commitments and fund
/about                                — Founding story and mission

## Editorial Articles
/learn/free-obituary-search           — How to find obituaries online for free
/learn/how-to-preserve-family-history
/learn/create-free-online-memorial
/learn/digital-legacy
/learn/how-to-write-a-memorial
/learn/vietnam-veterans-arkansas
/learn/living-memorial
/learn/preserving-voice-recordings
/learn/what-to-do-after-someone-dies-online
/learn/cemetery-records-online

## Mission
Free forever. No premium tier. No paywall on any existing record.
In the event of shutdown, all data is transferred to the Internet Archive.

## Data Sources
Legacy.com (all 50 states), Obituaries.com, Find A Grave, WikiTree,
state vital records (CA, TX, FL, NY, PA priority), international English-speaking
civil registries, funeral home aggregator feeds.
